title: rubus × rugosulus
intro: Rubus × rugosulus, a hybrid species within the Rubus genus, is a type of thorny shrub native to parts of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, flavonoids, and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × rugosulus include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anticancer properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Rubus × rugosulus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
